summary: Long-Term Investing Market Overview (P1/P2) fully verified. Backend: 24/24 tests passed. /api/lt-invest/market-overview returns 1250 companies with live prices, ratings, trading signals, investment signals, entry/stop/target, bull/bear cases, quality/growth/valuation ratings. Frontend: /long-term page loads with Market tab as default showing 1250 companies sorted by rating, category filter badges (Hot 233, Bullish 183, etc.), search functionality, expandable company cards with full analysis, Stage Buy modal with bucket selector.

backend_tests.auth_access_valid: PASS - Login with code Bullishalmarkhan7.7 returns token
backend_tests.market_overview_returns_companies: PASS - Returns 1250 companies with categories and sources
backend_tests.market_overview_company_fields: PASS - Each company has live_price, rating_score, rating_label, trade_signal, inv_signal, entry_zone, stop_loss, take_profit, bull_case, bear_case, quality_rating, growth_trend
backend_tests.market_overview_sorted_by_rating: PASS - Companies sorted by rating_score descending
backend_tests.market_overview_categories: PASS - Categories sum matches total (Watch 633, Hot 233, Bullish 183, Overpriced 87, Undervalued 65, Momentum 24, Bearish 20, Breakout 5)
backend_tests.portfolio_bucket_breakdown: PASS - All 3 buckets present (core, quality_growth, opportunistic_value) with allocation_pct, target_min, target_max, status
backend_tests.stage_buy_validates_fields: PASS - Returns error for missing required fields
backend_tests.stage_buy_creates_position: PASS - Creates position with symbol, bucket, shares, avg_cost, stage=1
backend_tests.recommendations_returns_list: PASS - Returns 31 recommendations with action, reason, priority
backend_tests.thesis_nonexistent: PASS - Returns error for non-existent position
backend_tests.thesis_for_position: PASS - Returns health_score, health_status, recommendation, original_thesis
backend_tests.close_validates_symbol: PASS - Returns error for missing symbol
backend_tests.close_workflow: PASS - Full workflow: create → verify → close → verify removed
backend_tests.data_quality_signals: PASS - All companies have trading or investment signal

frontend_tests.long_term_page_load: PASS - /long-term page loads with Long-Term Portfolio header
frontend_tests.summary_strip: PASS - Total Value, P&L, Positions, Diversification ring (0), Rebalance (OK) visible
frontend_tests.bucket_bars: PASS - Core (40-60%), Quality Growth (25-40%), Opportunistic Value (10-25%) bars visible with empty status
frontend_tests.tabs: PASS - Market (1250), Portfolio, Recs (31), Universe tabs visible
frontend_tests.market_tab_default: PASS - Market tab is default, shows 30 company cards per page
frontend_tests.market_search: PASS - Search 'AAPL' filters to 1 card, 'NVDA' filters to 1 card
frontend_tests.market_category_filters: PASS - All, Watch, Hot, Bullish, Overpriced, Undervalued, Momentum, Bearish, Breakout filters visible
frontend_tests.company_card_expand: PASS - Clicking card expands to show Entry Zone, Stop Loss, Take Profit, R:R, Vol Ratio, ATR, Quality/Growth/Valuation/Historical ratings, Bull Case
frontend_tests.stage_buy_modal: PASS - Opens with bucket selector (Core, Quality Growth, Opportunistic Value), Shares, Price, Investment Thesis fields, Stage Buy button
frontend_tests.portfolio_tab: PASS - Shows empty state 'No long-term positions yet'
frontend_tests.recommendations_tab: PASS - Shows 31 recommendation cards with BUY actions, scores, priorities, bucket assignments, Stage In buttons
frontend_tests.universe_tab: PASS - Shows Core ETFs (9), Quality Growth (25), Opportunistic Value sections with search

features_verified: /api/lt-invest/market-overview returns 1250 companies with live_price, rating_score, rating_label, trade_signal, inv_signal, entry_zone, stop_loss, take_profit, bull_case, bear_case, quality_rating, growth_trend
/api/lt-invest/stage-buy creates a position (tested with TEST_VOO, core, 2 shares, $450)
/api/lt-invest/thesis/{symbol} returns thesis health for a held position
Frontend /long-term page loads with Market tab as default showing company cards with ratings, live prices, category filter badges
Frontend Market tab search/filter works (search by symbol, filter by category like Hot/Bullish)
Frontend expanding a company card shows entry zone, stop loss, take profit, quality/growth/valuation ratings, bull/bear cases, analysis
Frontend Portfolio tab shows empty state when no positions
Frontend Recommendations tab shows 31 recommendation cards with BUY actions
Frontend stage buy modal opens from Market tab company card and has bucket selector
critical_code_review_comments: Market overview endpoint correctly merges trading_signals + investment_signals from MongoDB into unified company list
Companies sorted by rating_score descending (CRUS 90, TSM 88.8, CF 88, JHG 87, INCY 86.8, EXEL 86.2)
Category filter counts match: Watch (633), Hot (233), Bullish (183), Overpriced (87), Undervalued (65), Momentum (24), Bearish (20), Breakout (5)
Live prices fetched via price_integrity.get_batch_validated for all symbols
Frontend properly uses data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Stage Buy modal has bucket selector with Core, Quality Growth, Opportunistic Value options
seed_data_creation: Test positions TEST_VOO, TEST_THESIS, TEST_CLOSE created and cleaned up after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Long-Term Investing Market Overview (P1/P2) fully verified. /api/lt-invest/market-overview returns 1250 companies with full analysis data. Frontend /long-term page has Market tab as default with 1250 companies, category filters, search, expandable cards with full analysis, Stage Buy modal. All 4 tabs working: Market (1250 companies), Portfolio (empty state), Recs (31 recommendations), Universe (Core ETFs 9, Quality Growth 25, Opportunistic Value). Previous iteration 36 tested the basic LT system. This iteration verified the enhanced market-overview endpoint with 1250 companies.
